meta.title: What does CHINA think about the B-21 Raider?
meta.description:
A great deal of this video was informed by the excellent analysis work of 
U.S. Air Force’s China Aerospace Studies Institute senior researcher, Derek Solen. You can find his paper,  “PLA hopes B-21 will follow in B-2’s footsteps," here:
https://www.airuniversity.af.edu/CASI/Display/Article/3367275/the-pla-hopes-b-21-will-follow-in-b-2s-footsteps/
